title: Sprightly (only the gui)
description: The Sprightly texture pack is amazing, but some may not want the block or item textures included with it, so I made this! (Only the sprightly GUI!)
body:
The Sprightly texture pack is amazing, but some may not want the block or item textures included with it, so I made this! (Only the sprightly GUI!) 


![Sprightly gui Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40386a5bea25684126f2a1e4b1541394fd755eb4.png)
